# Conformance corpus feature coverage matrix

## Fixtures

| File | Depth | States | Vectors |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kernel_contract.fsl` | 2 | 7 | 21 |
| `conformance_failures.fsl` | 1 | 3 | 36 |

## Features

| Feature | Level | `kernel_contract.fsl` | `conformance_failures.fsl` | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `assignment_simultaneous` | exercised | 8 | - | An action commits >=2 state-field changes atomically in one fired transition (kernel semantics: assignment=simultaneous). |
| `reads_pre_state` | exercised | 2 | 1 | An action's update right-hand side self-references a variable it also writes, proving updates read the pre-state (kernel semantics: reads=pre_state). |
| `requires_false_not_enabled` | exercised | 11 | 3 | A false `requires` clause reports the action instance as not enabled instead of raising an error (kernel semantics: requires_false=not_enabled). |
| `failure_rollback` | exercised | 11 | 30 | A violated action leaves the committed state unchanged, retaining only `attempted_state` for diagnostics (kernel semantics: failure_state=rollback). |
| `old_pre_state` | exercised | 10 | 18 | An `old(...)` expression is declared and reached by a real fired transition or the violation it causes (kernel semantics: old=pre_state). |
| `integer_division_euclidean` | exercised | - | 4 | A literal integer division with a negative operand fires a successful transition whose recorded value matches Euclidean division, not truncating division (kernel semantics: integer_division=euclidean). |
| `terminal_deadlock` | declared | 1 | - | The contract declares a `terminal` expression excluding matching states from deadlock reporting (kernel semantics: terminal_deadlock=terminal_states_excluded). Reaching a state with zero enabled actions at the declared terminal condition needs a BFS depth beyond the coverage corpus's chosen fixture depths, so only declared (not fired) evidence is required. |
| `fairness_weak` | declared | 1 | - | The contract marks at least one action `fair` (kernel semantics: fairness=weak). Weak fairness is a liveness property over infinite/untaken traces with no finite-vector witness, so only declared evidence is required. |
| `outcome_ok` | exercised | 10 | 6 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "ok" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_requires_failed` | exercised | 11 | 3 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "requires_failed" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_partial_op` | exercised | - | 15 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "partial_op" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_type_bound` | exercised | - | 3 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "type_bound" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_invariant` | exercised | - | 3 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "invariant" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_trans` | exercised | - | 3 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "trans" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `outcome_ensures` | exercised | - | 3 | A conformance vector with outcome.kind == "ensures" is generated by the fixture corpus. |
| `value_int_range` | exercised | 30 | 3 | A domain/range-typed state field's concrete value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_bool` | exercised | - | 3 | A `Bool`-typed state field's concrete value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_enum` | exercised | 7 | - | An enum-typed value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_struct` | exercised | 7 | - | A struct-typed value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_option` | exercised | 14 | - | An `Option` value appears tagged `{"kind":"none"}`/`{"kind":"some","value":...}` in a generated state snapshot. A nested `Option<Option<_>>` tagged `some(none)` is additional, non-required evidence (see also the dedicated `conformance_distinguishes_nested_options_and_guard_partials` unit test, which is not part of the fixed fixture manifest this matrix scans). |
| `value_map` | exercised | 7 | - | A `Map` value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_set` | exercised | 7 | - | A `Set` value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `value_seq` | exercised | 7 | 3 | A `Seq` value appears in a generated state snapshot. |
| `partial_op_head` | declared | - | - | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `head` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `partial_op_pop` | exercised | - | 3 | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `pop` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `partial_op_at` | exercised | - | 3 | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `at` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `partial_op_index` | exercised | - | 3 | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `index` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `partial_op_divide` | exercised | - | 3 | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `divide` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `partial_op_remainder` | exercised | - | 3 | The contract declares a `partial_operations` entry for `remainder` (a firing outcome.kind == "partial_op" vector unambiguously attributable to it is additional, non-required evidence). |
| `quantification` | exercised | - | 6 | A `forall`/`exists` quantified expression is declared and evaluated across a real fired transition. |
| `param_finite_domains` | exercised | 2 | - | A typed/range action parameter's finite domain is declared and enumerated across >=2 distinct fired parameter bindings. |
| `requirement_traceability` | exercised | 21 | - | An action retains its requirement ID in the contract and fires at least one conformance vector. |
